query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.name,
  c.name as client_name,
  p.totalAmount,
  p.status,
  COUNT(DISTINCT pay.id) as payment_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN pay.movementType = 'payment' THEN pay.amount ELSE 0 END) as total_paid
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN clients c ON p.clientId = c.id
LEFT JOIN payments pay ON p.id = pay.projectId
WHERE p.status = 'archived'
GROUP BY p.id
ORDER BY p.id DESC
LIMIT 10;
